shannshawn fisher

I love this--so far have been doing everything I was doing on ChatGPT/Claude/Gemini without all of the extra cost and without damaging the environment. I feel free from fighting with an AI answer that I can't create something or say something because some profit mongering billionaire has deigned what I can have access to, while he destroys my community with a data center and takes all my water. I can create the app I need that does exactly what I need it to do to help people. Thank you!

Tomas Noel

#### What's great [...] Tomas Noel

#### What's great

Pansophy AI is fantastic because it delivers a fully local, private AI assistant that runs offline on your device with no subscriptions, token limits, or data leaks—perfect for secure tasks like coding, document analysis, and writing across Windows, macOS, Linux, and ChromeOS. Its one-time lifetime license and optional web search make it fast, controllable, and cost-effective, while enterprise versions use specialized LLMs for precise knowledge synthesis in large organizations, minimizing errors like hallucinations.

#### What needs improvement
